headline: $1.4 Trillion Needed for AI Data Center Electrification by 2030, Chief Investment Officer
summary: One quote is doing a lot of heavy lifting right now in energy circles. That single stat reframes the entire AI infrastructure trade. Everyone is chasing the picks and shovels of AI compute. But the real bottleneck isn’t chips or servers. It’s power. Chief Investment Officer Robert Schein gave a great reminder of it this ... $1.4 Trillion Needed for AI Data Center Electrification by 2030, Chief Investment Officer

headline: Constellation Energy-Calpine Deal Ties Largest Power Producer To AI Demand
summary: Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) has completed its acquisition of Calpine, creating what the company describes as the largest electricity producer in the United States. The combined business is entering long term power supply agreements with data center operator CyrusOne to deliver electricity for large scale facilities tied to AI and cloud computing. These moves expand Constellation Energy’s generation footprint and link a bigger share of its output to data center and AI related...
